name: Generic Invoice
description: Generic invoice or receipt. Detects invoice numbers, dates (multiple formats), EU VAT IDs (with optional space), international phone numbers, BIC/SWIFT, plus names, addresses, IBAN, emails. Amounts kept visible by default — toggle Amounts manually to hide totals too.

patterns.name: Invoice number
patterns.description: Invoice number with common prefixes (INV, INVOICE, N°, #, etc.)

patterns.name: EU VAT Number
patterns.description: EU VAT number — 2-letter uppercase country code (optional space) + 8 to 12 digits

patterns.name: BIC / SWIFT
patterns.description: BIC/SWIFT bank identifier — 8 or 11 uppercase chars (case-sensitive)

patterns.name: Date (any common format)
patterns.description: Dates in DD/MM/YYYY, MM/DD/YYYY, DD.MM.YYYY, DD-MM-YY etc.

patterns.name: International phone number
patterns.description: International phone with optional country code and separators
